title: Casella
content:
Test of the poet is knowledge of love,
    For Eros is older than Saturn or Jove;
    Never was poet, of late or of yore,
    Who was not tremulous with love-lore.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ralph Waldo Emerson delivers a powerful performance in "Casella"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
